description: DFRWS 2011 Mobile Forensics Challenge — Case 2. Live ADB acquisition with port-forward + netcat pull of mtd*.dd partitions and sdcard.dd.

expected_findings.note: Collection.log documents ADB port-forward and netcat stream acquisition of mtd*.dd images with SHA1 verification.
Strings/TSK sweep surfaces mobile telephony/contacts on mtd partitions and SD-card filesystem.
